title: Schedule periodic workspace-validate --substrate-wide --execute runs for ongoing factory-base hygiene
description: `wrkstrm-identifier workspace-validate` is the substrate xcworkspace's periodic-maintenance verb. As of this session it has handled three poison classes: stale `.swiftpm/xcode` cache directories (820 at FileRef paths + 1107 substrate-wide on first run), broken `.xcodeproj` bundles missing `project.pbxproj`, FileRefs pointing at paths that no longer exist. SPM regenerates `.swiftpm/xcode` cache on every package read, so the cache deletion mode is Sisyphean — but the FileRef pruning (broken xcodeproj + missing paths) is real cleanup that survives. Bead is to (a) integrate into a periodic cadence — operator runs once per week / month, OR (b) wire into a launchd or cron job that runs `workspace-validate --execute` (FileRef pruning only, no cache deletion) automatically. Cache deletion is cosmetic; FileRef pruning prevents xcodebuild walks from tripping on stale references. The substrate's 'factory base maintenance' pattern, parallel to memory-md-compaction: each surface accumulates entropy, each surface needs periodic compaction.
